---
name: Source correction
about: Report an outdated statistic, broken citation URL, or stale claim
title: "[source] "
labels: source-correction, evidence
assignees: ''
---

## Which doc, which claim

- File: `docs/...`
- Line or section:
- Current claim (quote or paraphrase):

## What's wrong

- [ ] Statistic is outdated (newer source available)
- [ ] Citation URL is dead or redirects unexpectedly
- [ ] Quote no longer accurate to source page
- [ ] Source's methodology was retracted or revised
- [ ] Other (describe)

## Proposed replacement

- Replacement statistic / claim:
- Source publisher:
- Source URL:
- Retrieval date (today):
- Why this source is more reliable:

## Evidence standard checklist

- [ ] Source URL loads and contains the cited claim verbatim or in meaning-preserving form
- [ ] Source is dated (publication year visible)
- [ ] Source is a primary publisher or peer-reviewed; agency blogs without primary citations are flagged

## Optional notes

(Anything else relevant — methodology concerns, multiple-source corroboration, etc.)
